'''Soka Linu''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]] who served in the [[Telos Security Force]] during the [[Dark Wars]]. In [[3951 BBY]], she and others guarded [[Meetra Surik]], [[Kreia]], and [[Atton Rand]] when they were placed on house arrest on the [[Citadel Station]].<ref name="KOTORII" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
